about_page_app_description: Read and listen to your books anytime, anywhere. Download 3ook Reader for a better experience.
about_page_author_dung_kai_cheung_desc: DUNG Kai Cheung shares his insights on publishing NFT books on blockchain: fair revenue sharing and reconnecting authors with readers.
about_page_author_fu_yue_an_desc: Discovering the surprising world of digital books with signed autographs — Fu Yue'an shares his experience publishing ebooks on 3ook.com.
about_page_author_kin_ko_desc: Kin Ko explains how blockchain technology addresses issues in second-hand book trading, royalty distribution, and book ownership.
about_page_author_stories_content: Hear from renowned authors about their experience publishing on 3ook.com and embracing the future of digital books.
about_page_contact_content: Experience the future of reading and listening.
about_page_description: Discover how 3ook.com combines AI narration and Web3 ownership to connect authors, publishers, and readers in a third-generation bookstore where every book can be read, listened to, and truly owned.
about_page_feature_affiliate_desc: Share books you love and earn up to 30% commission on every sale through your referral link.
about_page_feature_ai_narration_desc: Most books come with narration in multiple voices, creating an immersive listening experience. Some titles may be excluded due to license restrictions.
about_page_feature_author_benefits_desc: Authors receive up to 90% revenue share and can easily migrate from other platforms.
about_page_feature_curate_to_earn: Support Books You Love, Earn Rewards
about_page_feature_curate_to_earn_desc: Back your favorite books by staking LIKE tokens to boost their visibility and earn rewards. The more support a book receives, the higher it ranks in the store.
about_page_feature_dual_format_desc: Switch seamlessly between reading and listening modes for the perfect experience anytime, anywhere.
about_page_feature_web3_desc: Gift, lend, or resell your ebooks freely — your books stay in your wallet even if the platform changes. Sign in with email or connect your own wallet.
about_page_featured_authors_content: Discover the talented authors publishing on 3ook.com.
about_page_hero_subtitle: Thousands of ebooks with Cantonese, Mandarin, and English custom-voice narration — read or listen, anytime, anywhere.
about_page_library_description: With 3ook.com Plus, borrow from an extensive curation of books and read or listen to as many as you like — like a streaming service for books. Return anytime and pick up your next read. And every minute you spend reading or listening to the narration is paid back to the author — the longer you read or listen, the more they earn.
about_page_media_coverage_content: What the media is saying about 3ook.com.
about_page_newsletter_content: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest book releases, author interviews, and 3ook.com updates.
about_page_plus_description: Unlock the full 3ook.com experience: all-you-can-read Library borrowing, your own custom voice, exclusive discounts, and real-time support.
about_page_plus_feature_custom_voice: Record your own voice to create a personal narrator
about_page_plus_feature_early_access: Dark Mode and other exclusive features
about_page_what_is_content: 3ook.com offers thousands of Chinese ebooks with Cantonese, Mandarin, and English narration — so every book can be read and heard. Buy once and own permanently: your books live in your wallet, not locked to a platform.

app_description: 3ook.com — Read, Listen, Own. The 3rd-gen bookstore ecosystem where authors and readers co-create a decentralized home for books and periodicals. By merging AI-enhanced experiences with Web3 ownership, we safeguard the freedom to read and the integrity of our shared history.
app_page_cta_subtitle: Download 3ook Reader and bring your library wherever you go.
app_page_feature_background_audio_desc: Listen to books with the screen off, lock-screen controls, and seamless track-by-track auto-advance.
app_page_feature_notifications_desc: Get notified when new books from your favorite authors and publishers go live.
app_page_feature_tts_desc: Turn any book into an audiobook with AI narration in Cantonese, Mandarin, and English.
app_page_feature_universal_library_desc: One library across web and mobile — your bookshelf, reading progress, and listening queue stay in sync.
app_page_hero_subtitle: Read and listen to your books anytime, anywhere — with native background audio, lock-screen controls, and AI narration in Cantonese, Mandarin, and English.
app_page_meta_description: Download 3ook Reader for iOS and Android. Read and listen to 1,000+ books with AI narration, background audio, and lock-screen controls.
app_page_showcase_subtitle: Web, tablet, phone — your bookshelf, reading progress, and audio follow you everywhere.
book_list_description: Save books you want to read on 3ook.com. Build your personal 3ookList and check out your selections in one click.
bookshelf_offline_notice: You're offline — showing your saved shelf.
bookshelf_please_login_value: Own your books, read & listen anytime
bookshelf_plus_reading_locked_cta: Resubscribe to Plus to keep reading
bookshelf_refresh_failed_notice: Couldn't refresh your shelf. Showing your saved shelf.
burn_page_confirm_description: Are you sure you want to burn "{book}"? This action cannot be undone.
burn_page_confirm_warning: This book will be gone forever if burnt.
burn_page_warning_description: Once a book is burned, it will be gone forever and cannot be recovered.
careers_page_area_automation_desc: Build AI-driven automation across our workflows — publishing pipelines, development, and marketing — so a small team can ship like a big one.
careers_page_area_bd_desc: Grow our catalogue and community by partnering with authors, publishers, and affiliates who want a fairer, more direct relationship with readers.
careers_page_area_growth_desc: Automate social media, ads and ad assets, and close the loop on product, retention, and conversion analysis with data and AI.
careers_page_areas_content: We are a lean, AI-native team. We are hiring across the places where automation and human relationships compound.
careers_page_culture_ai_native_desc: We embrace AI and automation in our daily work — letting tools handle the repetitive parts so we can spend our time on what matters more.
careers_page_culture_content: We are a small team that grew out of LikeCoin's work since 2018 on fair compensation for creators. We move fast, stay lean, and let the work speak.
careers_page_culture_lean_desc: Small team, high ownership. You will pick up problems end to end and ship them, without waiting for permission.
careers_page_culture_reader_first_desc: We are here for reading culture, not hype. Every decision comes back to authors, publishers, and readers.
careers_page_description: Join 3ook.com and help build a third-generation bookstore where every book can be read, listened to, and truly owned. We are hiring in AI automation, business development, and growth.
careers_page_hero_subtitle: We are building a third-generation bookstore for the Traditional Chinese world — where every book can be read, listened to, and truly owned. Help us get there.
careers_page_hero_title: Build the future of reading with us
careers_page_job_automation_desc: Design and build AI automation for our web development and publishing workflows — from ingesting and formatting books to internal tooling. Ideal for a builder who reaches for AI and scripts before doing anything by hand.
careers_page_job_bd_desc: Build relationships with publishers and authors, bring their catalogues onto 3ook.com, and shape partnership and affiliate programmes.
careers_page_job_marketing_desc: Run our social media, marketing, and ad tech — producing ad assets, automating campaigns, and building the retention and conversion analysis loop. Using AI automation so one person can deliver what a whole team would is the goal we will grow toward together.
careers_page_job_marketing_title: Social Media, Marketing & Ad Tech Intern
careers_page_mission_content: Humanity at the core, technology in service of it — Web3 and AI are simply tools for advancing reading culture. We want to give the Traditional Chinese world an unrestricted reading space, returning the decision of what is worth reading to readers instead of letting algorithms filter the market.
careers_page_open_content: We are always glad to meet people who want to use new technology to reshape how books are published, sold, and read. Tell us what you would build.
careers_page_positions_content: We believe that with AI and automation, a small team can move the reading culture of an entire language. Every role here is an extension of that belief.

hk_local_histories_about_kicker: About the Project | Linking Communities: Preserving Hong Kong Community Stories with Blockchain
hk_local_histories_about_paragraph_1: Community papers are shared memories of neighborhoods, capturing everyday life, traditions, and cultural textures. Reading these stories helps us rediscover the face of our communities and reconnect with a sense of belonging.
hk_local_histories_about_paragraph_2: Community papers across Hong Kong's districts continue to document neighborhood changes and human stories with an independent spirit. 3ook.com uses Web3.0 blockchain technology to provide new paths for digital preservation and promotion of these precious community publications.
hk_local_histories_about_paragraph_3: We continuously collect and update community papers from Hong Kong's 18 districts, inviting you to explore local culture and stories. With digital technology, Hong Kong's community voices can reach more people, preserving the most sincere cultural memories of our neighborhoods.
hk_local_histories_about_title: Bringing community stories into the digital era, preserving neighborhood memories
hk_local_histories_featured_description: Search or filter community papers by keywords.
hk_local_histories_hero_description: Collecting community stories from across Hong Kong's 18 districts, deeply understanding the development and culture of each neighborhood.
hk_local_histories_overview_description: Click a region to view its community publications.
hk_local_histories_page_description: Explore community newspapers across Hong Kong's 18 districts, discovering local stories and cultural landscapes.
library_intro_banner_description: An extensive curation of books for Plus members to read and listen.
library_tab_description: The 3ook.com Library is a Plus-member benefit — borrow an extensive curated catalog of ebooks and audiobooks and read or listen to as much as you like, like a streaming service for books.
local_histories_about_kicker: About the Project | Linking Local: A New Media Path for Local Stories Powered by Blockchain
local_histories_about_paragraph_1: Local chronicles are shared memories of the land, capturing everyday life, traditions, and cultural textures. Reading these stories helps us rediscover the face of our hometowns and reconnect with a sense of belonging and identity.
local_histories_about_paragraph_2: Supported by Google’s nDX Digital Innovation Grant Program, 3ook.com uses Web3.0 blockchain technology to create a new digital publishing path for local magazines, independent bookstores, and creators. With tamper-proof preservation and a participatory advocacy model, local stories become lasting digital assets that continue to reach more people.
local_histories_about_paragraph_3: We continuously collect and update local chronicles and books across Taiwan, inviting you into this digital curation, “Taiwan Chronicles,” to explore local humanities, research archives, and public knowledge. With digital technology crossing geographic boundaries, Taiwan’s local voices can be heard worldwide, preserving the most sincere cultural foundations of this land.
local_histories_about_title: Bringing local stories into the digital era, preserving the memory of the land
local_histories_featured_description: Search or filter local histories by keywords.
local_histories_hero_description: Collecting community stories from all over Taiwan, deeply understanding the development and culture of each region.
local_histories_index_description: Explore local stories and community memories from different regions.
local_histories_index_hk_description: Explore community newspapers across Hong Kong's 18 districts.
local_histories_index_tw_description: Local chronicles and community stories from across Taiwan.
local_histories_overview_description: Click a region to view its local history groups.
local_histories_page_description: Explore historical culture and local stories from different regions, understanding the unique characteristics of various places through local histories.
